PDS Element: Primary Function: Efficient and Sustainable Lawn Mowing
Justification: The core purpose is to effectively cut grass to a desired height, maintaining lawn aesthetics while prioritizing environmental responsibility.; Mowing efficiency will be quantified by a target of at least 100 square meters per kWh of energy consumed, and a time to mow a standard 100 sq meter lawn of under 5 minutes.; Sustainability targets include a minimum of 75% recycled content in plastic components and a 20% reduction in embodied energy compared to a benchmark gasoline mower.; The mower must achieve a cutting height accuracy of within +/- 0.5 cm of the selected setting across its operational range.

PDS Element: Target User: Homeowners and Small-Scale Landscapers
Justification: The product is designed for residential property owners and small landscaping businesses prioritizing eco-friendly operations.; For homeowners, ease of use, quiet operation, and low maintenance are key. For landscapers, durability, battery swap capability for extended runtime, and faster charging are critical.; Intuitive operation will be defined by a one-button start/stop system, clear LED status indicators for battery and operational modes, and tool-less adjustment mechanisms.; The product must be robust enough for daily use by landscapers, including operation on varied terrain and in conditions that may be more demanding than typical residential use.

PDS Element: Performance: Cutting Width and Height Adjustment
Justification: A cutting width of 46 cm (18 inches) is specified, with a maximum acceptable weight of 25 kg (including battery) to ensure optimal maneuverability.; The mower must offer adjustable cutting heights from 2.5 cm (1 inch) to 7.5 cm (3 inches), with a tolerance of +/- 0.5 cm from the selected height.; The height adjustment mechanism will be a single-point lever system, requiring no more than 15N of force to operate and designed for a minimum of 10,000 cycles.

The mulching system must reduce grass clippings to pieces smaller than 5 mm, ensuring a visually indistinguishable finish from clippings left on the lawn.; The grass bag will have a minimum capacity of 50 liters, designed to be effectively filled to 80% capacity before requiring emptying.; The bag attachment and detachment mechanism must be operable with one hand in under 5 seconds, requiring no tools.

The mower will utilize a 40V or 60V lithium-ion battery system, providing a minimum runtime of 45 minutes or sufficient power to mow at least 400 square meters on a single charge.; Battery charging time will be a maximum of 2 hours for a full charge, with an option for an 80% charge within 45 minutes via a fast-charging accessory.; The battery system will achieve a minimum of 750 charge cycles before capacity degrades below 80% of its original state, and will support a charging speed of at least 4A.

The primary chassis and deck components will be constructed from at least 75% post-consumer recycled HDPE or PP plastics.; Virgin plastics will be limited to critical structural or functional components where recycled alternatives are not yet viable, with a target of less than 10% of total plastic mass.; Non-recyclable materials will be avoided where possible, with a clear end-of-life recycling strategy for all components.; The cutting blade will be made from hardened steel (Rockwell hardness HRC 50-55) and designed for a minimum of 3 sharpenings before replacement is recommended.

The electric motor will achieve an energy conversion efficiency of at least 85% under typical load conditions.; Key wear parts, including the battery, blade, and drive belt (if applicable), will have a projected lifespan of at least 5 years or 500 hours of operation, whichever comes first.; The product will be designed for repairability, with spare parts available for a minimum of 7 years post-production and an average repair time of under 30 minutes for common issues.

The product will be designed for disassembly, with a target of complete disassembly for recycling within 15 minutes using a maximum of 3 common tools.; All major plastic and metal components will be clearly labeled according to ISO 11469 standards to facilitate sorting and recycling.; A manufacturer-supported take-back program for batteries and end-of-life mowers will be established.

PDS Element: Ergonomics and Usability: Handle and Controls
Justification: Vibration levels at the operator's hands will be maintained below the limits specified by ISO 2631-1:1997 (e.g., below 2.5 m/s² for hand-arm vibration).; All primary controls (start, stop, height adjustment) will be operable with a single hand, providing clear tactile and visual feedback upon activation.; The safety bail lever will require an activation force of between 5N and 20N, and the blade and motor will stop within 3 seconds of the lever being released.

PDS Element: Ergonomics and Usability: Mobility and Storage
Justification: The total weight of the mower, including the battery, will not exceed 25 kg.; The folding handle mechanism will allow the mower to be folded and unfolded in under 30 seconds without the need for tools.; When folded, the mower's dimensions (L x W x H) will not exceed 80 cm x 50 cm x 40 cm, ensuring it fits within standard storage spaces.

The blade brake clutch (BBC) system will ensure the blade stops rotating within 3 seconds of the safety bail lever being released.; The motor will incorporate electronic overload protection that safely shuts down the motor if excessive load is detected, resetting after a cool-down period.; The product must comply with all relevant safety standards, including UL 60335-2-77 for outdoor electrical equipment and relevant CE directives.

Key components (motor, battery, deck) will have a projected lifespan of at least 5 years or 500 hours of operation, whichever comes first, under normal usage conditions.; The mower will be designed to withstand dust ingress to an IPX4 rating and occasional exposure to light rain or dew.; Materials will be UV-stabilized and resistant to corrosion, with tested performance in ambient temperatures from 0°C to 40°C and relative humidity up to 85%.

The sound pressure level at the operator's ear will not exceed 75 dB(A) when measured at a distance of 1 meter under typical mowing conditions.; The sound power level emitted to the surroundings will be minimized, aiming for a benchmark below 90 dB(A) to reduce neighborhood disturbance.

User maintenance will be limited to cleaning the deck after each use and visual inspection of the blade.; Blade sharpening will be recommended every 25 hours of use, with replacement recommended after 3 sharpenings.; Battery health will be indicated by an integrated LED indicator on the battery pack, with user guidance provided in the manual for interpretation.

The design will feature minimal visible fasteners, smooth surface transitions, and an overall 'organic minimalism' aesthetic, conveying a sense of advanced technology and environmental harmony.; A primary color palette of forest green and charcoal gray will be used, with accents of brushed aluminum or a contrasting bright color for safety-critical controls.

The target retail price will be competitive within the premium electric mower segment, with a benchmark price range of $450-$600.; The total cost of ownership over 5 years is projected to be at least 30% lower than a comparable gasoline mower, considering fuel, maintenance, and electricity costs.; A standard warranty of 3 years on the mower and 2 years on the battery will be offered to support durability and reliability claims.

The battery system will be compatible with a defined range of other garden tools from the same manufacturer, specifically including a string trimmer, leaf blower, and hedge trimmer.; The physical and electrical interface for the battery will adhere to a proprietary standard ensuring seamless integration and safe operation across compatible devices.

Electrical components and battery housing will meet an IPX4 rating for splash resistance, allowing operation in light rain or dew.; The mower must not be operated in heavy rain or during thunderstorms. Storage is recommended in a dry environment between -10°C and 50°C, protected from direct sunlight and extreme temperatures.
